# searchResultKeyPath

**Instance Property**

A key path for the string property to display for each object in the search results array.

## Declaration

```swift
var searchResultKeyPath: String? { get set }
```

## Discussion

The search view controller uses the key path to find the textual description of each object in [doc://com.apple.notificationcenter/documentation/NotificationCenter/NCWidgetSearchViewController/searchResults]. The default value of this property is “description”.

## Displaying Search Results

- **searchResults**: An array of search results.
